title: cymbopogon exaltatus
intro: Cymbopogon exaltatus, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a type of grass native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Cymbopogon exaltatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. In herbal preparations, Cymbopogon exaltatus is often used in teas, infusions, and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
